one_time_description: Purchase of shares in Gensource Potash Corp. for $1,000,000; market value at year end was $666,667 resulting in $333,333 unrealized loss recorded in remeasurement
economic_notes: First Nation holds 8.3% interest in Keseechiwan Holdings LP and FHQTC Developments LP. Owns 100% of New Horizon First Nations Administration Inc., Nekaneet Management Ltd., Nekaneet Holdings GP Ltd., and Nekaneet First Nation Investment Holdings Ltd. Member of File Hills Qu'Appelle Tribal Council (11 nations). Invested $1,000,000 in Gensource Potash Corp shares. TC Keystone Pipeline LP interest generating income.
notes: Fiscal year ends March 31, 2023 (not 2024). Comparative 2022 figures were restated per Note 28. Net financial position is net debt of $6,172,612. Accumulated surplus includes $333,333 unrealized remeasurement loss on Gensource Potash Corp portfolio investment. ISC 2022 prior year shows $4,595,006 in Note 15 vs $4,579,260 in statement - minor reconciliation difference noted. Four GBEs accounted for under modified equity method with combined negative equity of $1,175,531 shown as liability. Two entities consolidated (Operations and CMHC Housing Fund). No remuneration schedule found in extracted text. total_government_transfers calculated as ISC $5,355,434 + Canada Heritage $300,000 + CMHC $251,118 + First Nations Trust $215,438 + FSIS $214,163 + Ottawa Trust $175,598 + FHQTC $128,162 + SK Government $52,329 = $6,692,242.
